sigma.title: UAC Bypass Using Consent and Comctl32 - File
UAC Bypass Using .NET Code Profiler on MMC
UAC Bypass Using IDiagnostic Profile - File
UAC Bypass Using MSConfig Token Modification - File
UAC Bypass Using NTFS Reparse Point - File
UAC Bypass Abusing Winsat Path Parsing - File

osquery.name: t1548_002_suid
osquery.query_text: SELECT path, username, groupname, permissions FROM suid_bin;

osquery.name: t1548_002_proc_priv
osquery.query_text: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline, uid, gid FROM processes WHERE uid = 0 AND parent != 0 ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 100;

osquery.name: t1548_002_proc_hidden
osquery.query_text: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline, on_disk, cwd FROM processes WHERE on_disk = 0 OR path = '' ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 100;
